## Stage Submission

<!-- PR title MUST be: [Stage 0N] @your-username -->
<!-- Example: [Stage 02] @janedoe -->

### Checklist

- [ ] My PR title follows the format `[Stage 0N] @username`
- [ ] I have read the Stage N README and completed all required tasks
- [ ] All files in `tests/`, `.github/`, and `scripts/graders/` are **unchanged**
- [ ] My code runs locally without errors
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any secrets or credentials

### Testing
